name: Five Cup Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned mandarin oranges and pineapple chunks.
2. In a large bowl, combine the sour cream, drained mandarin oranges, drained pineapple chunks, juice from the pineapple, and flaked coconut.
3. Stir in the miniature marshmallows until well mixed.
4. Chill the salad mixture for several hours or overnight to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve spoonfuls of the chilled fruit salad into lettuce cups.
6. Garnish each serving with grapes or cherries before serving.
